items.title: Tie ball game at 45 at halftime which is remarkable considering where this thing seemed to be going. Pacers 12 of 33 from the floor, 5 of 12 from 3, 8 of 12 at the line. Raptors 17 of 40, 3 of 13, 5 of 7. Mast 13 points, Slawson 10, Yuki 8. Lundy 11, Bradley 10.

items.title: Some fun facts about Jaden Bradley:
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Some fun facts about Jaden Bradley:
- 41 of his 66 points in the NCAA tournament came in the 2nd half of games!
- 8th in the Big 12 in total assists & steals
- They called him "Silk Bradley" in high school, born in Rochester, NY!
- 2025-26 Big 12 Player of the Year

items.title: A Jaden Bradley fun fact: Went to IMG Academy in Florida. Two of their alums who went on to be NBA draft picks? Toronto's own Zach Edey and Dwight Powell.
items.author: Wolstat

items.title: Draft News: A league source tells me UConn's Tarris Reed was in for a predraft workout with the Celtics this past weekend in a group that also included Arizona's Jaden Bradley, Illinois' Ben Humrichous, Miami (OH)'s Peter Suder, and UNC's Seth Trimble.
items.author: John Karalis
items.body_excerpt: Draft News: A league source tells me UConn's Tarris Reed was in for a predraft workout with the Celtics this past weekend in a group that also included Arizona's Jaden Bradley, Illinois' Ben Humrichous, Miami (OH)'s Peter Suder, and UNC's Seth Trimble.

items.title: Hollander POTD Anthony Parker. Bradley SG was drafted 21st in 97 by PHI. Struggled in NBA before going to Maccabi Tel Aviv in 00 where he was Euroleague MVP 2x. Returned to NBA w/TOR in 06 & was solid starter (peak 12 ppg w/good D) thru 12. Now in ORL front office.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
